title: The GitHub Blog
description: Updates, ideas, and inspiration from GitHub to help developers build and design software.

items.title: How GitHub used secret scanning to reach inbox zero
items.content:
GitHub had 20,000+ secret scanning alerts across 15,000 repositories. Here's how we separated signal from noise, built remediation workflows, and reached inbox zero in nine months.

The post How GitHub used secret scanning to reach inbox zero appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
GitHub had 20,000+ secret scanning alerts across 15,000 repositories. Here's how we separated signal from noise, built remediation workflows, and reached inbox zero in nine months.
The post How GitHub used secret scanning to reach inbox zero appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Natalie Guevara

summaries.zh: GitHub通过秘密扫描功能处理了15,000个仓库中超过20,000个警报。公司通过区分信号与噪音、建立修复流程，在九个月内实现了收件箱清零。该总结基于《GitHub博客》文章《How GitHub used secret scanning to reach inbox zero》。
summaries.en: GitHub addressed over 20,000 secret scanning alerts across 15,000 repositories by implementing workflows to distinguish between critical and minor issues. The company developed remediation processes to manage the alerts effectively and achieved "inbox zero" within nine months. The strategy involved filtering noise from actionable threats, streamlining response procedures, and improving overall security management.

items.summary: GitHub通过秘密扫描功能处理了15,000个仓库中超过20,000个警报。公司通过区分信号与噪音、建立修复流程，在九个月内实现了收件箱清零。该总结基于《GitHub博客》文章《How GitHub used secret scanning to reach inbox zero》。

items.title: 6 security settings every GitHub maintainer should enable this week
items.content:
These six free settings will not make your project unhackable. Nothing will. What they will do is close the easy doors. Turn these on, and your project will be meaningfully harder to attack than it was before.

The post 6 security settings every GitHub maintainer should enable this week appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
These six free settings will not make your project unhackable. Nothing will. What they will do is close the easy doors. Turn these on, and your project will be meaningfully harder to attack than it was before.
The post 6 security settings every GitHub maintainer should enable this week appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Natalie Guevara

summaries.zh: GitHub维护者应立即启用的六项安全设置。这些免费设置无法使项目完全防 hack，但能关闭易受攻击的漏洞，显著提高项目安全性。启用这些设置后，项目将比以往更难被攻击。
summaries.en: The article highlights six essential security settings GitHub maintainers should enable to enhance project protection. These settings, though not foolproof, help close vulnerabilities and make projects significantly harder to attack. The article emphasizes their importance in improving security without offering absolute immunity. The advice is part of a broader effort to strengthen codebase safety on GitHub.

items.summary: GitHub维护者应立即启用的六项安全设置。这些免费设置无法使项目完全防 hack，但能关闭易受攻击的漏洞，显著提高项目安全性。启用这些设置后，项目将比以往更难被攻击。

items.title: How GitHub maintains compliance for open source dependencies
items.content:
Explore how the Open Source Program Office uses GitHub’s new license compliance product to manage open source dependencies at scale.

The post How GitHub maintains compliance for open source dependencies appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
Explore how the Open Source Program Office uses GitHub’s new license compliance product to manage open source dependencies at scale.
The post How GitHub maintains compliance for open source dependencies appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Natalie Guevara

summaries.zh: GitHub通过其新的许可证合规产品，利用开源项目办公室（OSPO）管理大规模的开源依赖项，确保合规性。该产品帮助团队自动监控和审计开源组件的许可证，降低合规风险。此举旨在提高开发效率，同时确保遵守相关法规。
summaries.en: GitHub's Open Source Program Office (OSPO) leverages a new license compliance product to manage open source dependencies at scale. The tool helps organizations monitor and ensure compliance with license requirements for third-party software. By automating the process, GitHub aims to streamline compliance efforts, reducing risks associated with open source usage. The solution supports large-scale projects by tracking dependencies and flagging potential issues. This approach enhances transparency and adherence to licensing standards in open source ecosystems.

items.summary: GitHub通过其新的许可证合规产品，利用开源项目办公室（OSPO）管理大规模的开源依赖项，确保合规性。该产品帮助团队自动监控和审计开源组件的许可证，降低合规风险。此举旨在提高开发效率，同时确保遵守相关法规。

items.title: Highlights from Git 2.55
items.content:
The open source Git project just released Git 2.55. Here is GitHub’s look at some of the most interesting features and changes introduced since last time.

The post Highlights from Git 2.55 appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
The open source Git project just released Git 2.55. Here is GitHub’s look at some of the most interesting features and changes introduced since last time.
The post Highlights from Git 2.55 appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Natalie Guevara

summaries.zh: Git 2.55版本发布，GitHub总结了该版本的主要功能和更新。新版本引入了多项改进，提升了开发效率和代码管理能力。具体亮点包括优化性能、增强的克隆和推送功能，以及新的命令行工具。这些更新旨在为开发者提供更流畅、更强大的版本控制体验。
summaries.en: Git 2.55 has been released, with GitHub highlighting its key features and changes. The update includes notable improvements and new capabilities for users. The release builds on previous versions, enhancing performance and usability. GitHub's overview focuses on the most significant updates, providing insights into the advancements in the open-source version control system.

items.summary: Git 2.55版本发布，GitHub总结了该版本的主要功能和更新。新版本引入了多项改进，提升了开发效率和代码管理能力。具体亮点包括优化性能、增强的克隆和推送功能，以及新的命令行工具。这些更新旨在为开发者提供更流畅、更强大的版本控制体验。

items.title: Inside the Advisory Database and what happens when vulnerability volume breaks records
items.content:
The GitHub Advisory Database is processing more vulnerability reports than ever before. Here's what's driving the surge, how we're responding, and how the community can help.

The post Inside the Advisory Database and what happens when vulnerability volume breaks records appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
The GitHub Advisory Database is processing more vulnerability reports than ever before. Here's what's driving the surge, how we're responding, and how the community can help.
The post Inside the Advisory Database and what happens when vulnerability volume breaks records appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Natalie Guevara

summaries.zh: GitHub Advisory Database处理漏洞报告量创历史新高。文章分析了增长原因，介绍了应对措施，并呼吁社区协助。
summaries.en: The GitHub Advisory Database is handling a record number of vulnerability reports. The article explores the factors behind this surge, GitHub's response strategies, and ways the community can contribute. It highlights the increasing importance of timely and accurate reporting to maintain software security. The post provides insights into managing high-volume vulnerability data and fostering collaborative efforts to address emerging threats.

items.summary: GitHub Advisory Database处理漏洞报告量创历史新高。文章分析了增长原因，介绍了应对措施，并呼吁社区协助。

items.title: GitHub and UNDP team up to advance development priorities in Ghana with open source
items.content:
GitHub joined the United Nations Development Programme in Ghana to explore how open source governance can support one of West Africa's most ambitious digital reform efforts.

The post GitHub and UNDP team up to advance development priorities in Ghana with open source appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
GitHub joined the United Nations Development Programme in Ghana to explore how open source governance can support one of West Africa's most ambitious digital reform efforts. 
The post GitHub and UNDP team up to advance development priorities in Ghana with open source appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Natalie Guevara

summaries.zh: GitHub与联合国开发计划署（UNDP）在加纳合作，探索开源治理如何支持西非雄心勃勃的数字改革。此举旨在通过开源技术推动加纳发展优先事项的实现。
summaries.en: GitHub and the UNDP are collaborating in Ghana to leverage open-source governance for West Africa's digital reform initiatives. The partnership aims to advance development priorities through open-source solutions.

items.summary: GitHub与联合国开发计划署（UNDP）在加纳合作，探索开源治理如何支持西非雄心勃勃的数字改革。此举旨在通过开源技术推动加纳发展优先事项的实现。

items.title: Transitioning as a Hubber
items.content:
How GitHub's culture and benefits helped me be the best version of myself.

The post Transitioning as a Hubber appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
How GitHub's culture and benefits helped me be the best version of myself.
The post Transitioning as a Hubber appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Natalie Guevara

summaries.zh:
文章标题：《作为中心成员的转型》

GitHub的文化和福利帮助我成为更好的自己。该文最初发表于GitHub博客。
summaries.en: The article "Transitioning as a hubber" on The GitHub Blog discusses how GitHub's culture and benefits supported personal growth. The author reflects on their experience, emphasizing how the platform's environment helped them achieve their best self. The piece highlights GitHub's positive impact on professional development and well-being. (98 words)

items.summary:
文章标题：《作为中心成员的转型》

GitHub的文化和福利帮助我成为更好的自己。该文最初发表于GitHub博客。

items.title: Evaluating performance and efficiency of the GitHub Copilot agentic harness across models and tasks
items.content:
Explore how the GitHub Copilot agentic harness delivers strong results across multiple benchmarks and leading token efficiency, while maintaining flexibility to choose among more than 20 models.

The post Evaluating performance and efficiency of the GitHub Copilot agentic harness across models and tasks appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
Explore how the GitHub Copilot agentic harness delivers strong results across multiple benchmarks and leading token efficiency, while maintaining flexibility to choose among more than 20 models.
The post Evaluating performance and efficiency of the GitHub Copilot agentic harness across models and tasks appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Natalie Guevara

summaries.zh: GitHub Copilot的智能代理框架在多项基准测试中表现优异，并展现出领先的token效率。该框架支持选择超过20种模型，兼顾性能与灵活性。
summaries.en: The GitHub Copilot agentic harness delivers strong performance across multiple benchmarks and achieves leading token efficiency. It offers flexibility by supporting over 20 models, allowing users to choose the best option for their tasks. The harness demonstrates consistent effectiveness in various scenarios, highlighting its versatility and efficiency.

items.summary: GitHub Copilot的智能代理框架在多项基准测试中表现优异，并展现出领先的token效率。该框架支持选择超过20种模型，兼顾性能与灵活性。

items.title: I automated my job (and it made me a better leader)
items.content:
Explore how my day as a senior leader looks now that I use 40 automations to help, and learn more about some of my favorites.

The post I automated my job (and it made me a better leader) appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
Explore how my day as a senior leader looks now that I use 40 automations to help, and learn more about some of my favorites.
The post I automated my job (and it made me a better leader) appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Natalie Guevara

summaries.zh: 文章《我自动化了工作（并成为更好的领导者）》介绍了某高管如何通过运用40项自动化工具来优化日常工作，并分享了其中一些自认为最有效的工具。文章展示了自动化如何提升工作效率，并帮助作者成为更出色的领导者。
summaries.en: The author, a senior leader, now uses 40 automations to enhance their daily work. The article details how these tools improve efficiency and leadership. It highlights favorite automation methods, showcasing their practical benefits. The piece emphasizes automation's role in optimizing productivity and decision-making.

items.summary: 文章《我自动化了工作（并成为更好的领导者）》介绍了某高管如何通过运用40项自动化工具来优化日常工作，并分享了其中一些自认为最有效的工具。文章展示了自动化如何提升工作效率，并帮助作者成为更出色的领导者。

items.title: GitHub joins coalition advocating for fixes to California AI Transparency Act to protect open source
items.content:
We’re calling for targeted amendments to resolve conflicts with open source licensing and align with international transparency frameworks while preserving regulatory intent.

The post GitHub joins coalition advocating for fixes to California AI Transparency Act to protect open source appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.contentSnippet:
We’re calling for targeted amendments to resolve conflicts with open source licensing and align with international transparency frameworks while preserving regulatory intent.
The post GitHub joins coalition advocating for fixes to California AI Transparency Act to protect open source appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
items.creator: Natalie Guevara

summaries.zh: GitHub加入联盟，呼吁修改加州AI透明法案，以解决与开源许可的冲突，并与国际透明框架保持一致，同时保留监管意图。此举旨在保护开源社区，确保法案不影响其发展。
summaries.en: GitHub has joined a coalition advocating for amendments to California's AI Transparency Act. The group seeks targeted changes to resolve conflicts with open-source licensing and align with international transparency frameworks, while preserving the act's regulatory intent. The initiative aims to protect open-source development while ensuring compliance with AI regulations.

items.summary: GitHub加入联盟，呼吁修改加州AI透明法案，以解决与开源许可的冲突，并与国际透明框架保持一致，同时保留监管意图。此举旨在保护开源社区，确保法案不影响其发展。
